name: 兰州
description: Lanzhou, capital of Gansu Province, sits at the edge of the Tibetan Plateau where the Yellow River flows through the city. Famous as the start of the ancient Silk Road, home to the legendary Lanzhou beef noodles, and gateway to Gansu's historic sites. The Yellow River bridges and waterfront walks make this a unique urban destination.
highlights: Yellow River waterfront - Iconic iron bridge
Lanzhou beef noodles - China's most famous noodles
Baita Mountain Park - Panoramic city views
Gansu Provincial Museum - Silk Road artifacts

climate.tips: Best in spring and fall for comfortable weather. Summers can be hot. Winters are cold but clear. Spring brings sandstorms from Gobi. Lanzhou beef noodles are best in early morning.

attractions.name: 中山桥
attractions.description: Historic 1907 iron bridge crossing the Yellow River, iconic symbol of Lanzhou and engineering marvel of its era.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for golden hour photos. Walk across for river views. The bridge is beautifully lit at night.

attractions.name: 白塔山公园
attractions.description: Hilltop park with iconic White Pagoda, offering panoramic views of Lanzhou and the Yellow River winding through the city.
attractions.tips: Take cable car up, walk down. The pagoda is beautiful at sunset. Combine with riverside walk.

attractions.name: 甘肃省博物馆
attractions.description: Excellent museum showcasing Silk Road artifacts, ancient Buddhist sculptures, and Gansu's diverse cultural heritage.
attractions.tips: Allow 2-3 hours. The Buddhist gallery is exceptional. Audio guides available. Combine with nearby Waterwheel Park.

attractions.name: 水车博览园
attractions.description: Open-air park displaying traditional waterwheels used for irrigation along the Yellow River, with sculptures and river views.
attractions.tips: Best near sunset. The waterwheels are photogenic. Combine with Yellow River boat ride.

attractions.name: 西关清真寺
attractions.description: Historic mosque with elegant Chinese-Islamic architecture, center of Lanzhou's Muslim community.
attractions.tips: Modest dress required. Non-Muslims welcome outside prayer times. The architecture is beautiful.

attractions.name: 五泉山公园
attractions.description: Historic park with five springs, ancient temples, and forested hills offering escape from city bustle.
attractions.tips: Good morning hike spot. The springs have interesting legends. Wear comfortable shoes for stone steps.

attractions.name: 黄河母亲河
attractions.description: Iconic sculpture of mother and child on Yellow River bank, symbol of Lanzhou and popular photo spot.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset with river. Walk along the riverside south. Combine with Waterwheel Park.

attractions.name: 雁滩公园
attractions.description: Riverside park on former goose island with gardens, pavilions, and peaceful atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Good for morning tai chi. The island setting is unique. Less crowded than central areas.

attractions.name: 读本人山
attractions.description: Mountain offering panoramic views of Lanzhou, Yellow River, and surrounding landscape from observation platform.
attractions.tips: Best at sunset for city views. Take cable car for easier climb. Bring camera for photos.

attractions.name: 兰州博物馆
attractions.description: City museum showcasing Lanzhou's 2,000-year history, Silk Road trade, and Yellow River civilization.
attractions.tips: Good introduction to the city. Audio guides available. Combine with nearby shopping streets.

attractions.name: 青城古镇
attractions.description: Historic ancient town with well-preserved Ming and Qing architecture, ancestral halls, and canals.
attractions.tips: Half-day trip from Lanzhou. The waterwheel irrigation system is unique. Try local sweet mulberries.

attractions.name: 炳灵寺石窟
attractions.description: UNESCO-listed cave complex with 200 Buddhist caves dating to Western Qin Dynasty, accessible by boat on Yellow River.
attractions.tips: Take boat from Liujiaxia Dam. The cave complex is impressive. Full day trip from Lanzhou.

attractions.name: 刘家峡
attractions.description: Yellow River canyon with stunning blue waters, ancient cave temples, and hydroelectric dam scenery.
attractions.tips: The color contrast between Yellow River and clear water is stunning. Combine with Bingling Caves.

attractions.name: 桃花岛
attractions.description: River island with peach orchards, gardens, and pavilions, beautiful in spring when blossoms bloom.
attractions.tips: Best in April-May for peach blossoms. The island is romantic. Boat rides available.

attractions.name: 意门
attractions.description: Historic city gate and section of ancient Lanzhou city wall, symbol of the city's Ming Dynasty heritage.
attractions.tips: Best lit at night. The ancient wall is well preserved. Good photo location near downtown.

attractions.name: 西湖公园
attractions.description: Urban park with lake, gardens, and teahouses, popular morning exercise spot for locals.
attractions.tips: Best in early morning for local exercise scenes. The park reflects local culture. Nice teahouse for rest.

attractions.name: 金塔山
attractions.description: Historic Buddhist temple on hillside with ancient pagodas and peaceful monastery atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Combine with Five Spring Mountain hike. The temple is peaceful. Morning visits recommended.

attractions.name: 兴隆山
attractions.description: Nature reserve with alpine scenery, ancient trees, andDaoist temples, perfect for hiking.
attractions.tips: Good for day hike from Lanzhou. Ancient pines are impressive. Bring water and snacks for trail.

attractions.name: 黄河三峡
attractions.description: Stunning river gorge with dramatic cliffs, clear waters, and ancient cave temples along the Yellow River.
attractions.tips: Take boat through gorges. The canyon scenery rivals Yangtze. Best combined with Liujiaxia.

attractions.name: 民族金街
attractions.description: Bustling pedestrian street with local snacks, shopping, and Lanzhou's traditional atmosphere.
attractions.tips: Best in evening for food stalls. Try Lanzhou beef noodles here. Great for souvenirs.

attractions.name: 河口古镇
attractions.description: Historic town at former Silk Road crossing with ancient streets, temples, and Yellow River views.
attractions.tips: Less touristy than expected. The ancient temples are well preserved. Good for photography.

attractions.name: 银滩湿地公园
attractions.description: Urban wetland with boardwalks, bird watching, and ecological education facilities.
attractions.tips: Good for morning bird watching. The boardwalk is pleasant. Bring binoculars for birds.

attractions.name: 黄河母亲雕塑
attractions.description: 黄河岸边标志性雕塑，长6米、高2.6米。

attractions.name: 五泉山公园
attractions.description: 因五眼清泉得名，有2000多年历史。

attractions.name: 西关清真大寺
attractions.description: 兰州最大的清真寺，融合中阿建筑风格。

attractions.name: 南山公园
attractions.description: 兰州南部的绿色屏障，可俯瞰城市全景。

attractions.name: 兰州黄河铁桥
attractions.description: 黄河上最早的铁桥，由德国人建造，已有百年历史。

attractions.name: 河口古镇
attractions.description: 兰州西郊的古镇，保留了明清时期的建筑风格。

attractions.name: 兴隆山
attractions.description: 兰州南部的国家级自然保护区，有云龙桥等景点。

attractions.name: 敦煌艺术馆
attractions.description: 复制了敦煌莫高窟的经典洞窟，可近距离欣赏壁画。
attractions.tips: 不去敦煌也能看莫高窟。

attractions.name: 兰州牛肉面博物馆
attractions.description: 展示兰州牛肉面的历史和制作工艺。

attractions.name: 白塔寺
attractions.description: 始建于元代，白塔高17米，是兰州最古老的建筑之一。

attractions.name: 沿黄河风情线
attractions.description: 兰州最著名的城市景观带，沿黄河两岸延伸40公里。

attractions.name: 兰州新区
attractions.description: 兰州城市新中心，有现代化建筑和商业区。

attractions.name: 张掖路步行街
attractions.description: 兰州最繁华的商业步行街。

attractions.name: 白塔山森林
attractions.description: 兰州城内的天然氧吧，森林覆盖率高。

attractions.name: 仁寿山
attractions.description: 兰州北部的风景区，有明代古建筑群。

attractions.name: 安宁桃花会
attractions.description: 每年4月举办，万亩桃花盛开，是兰州春天最美景色。

attractions.name: 中山桥
attractions.description: 黄河上第一座铁桥。

attractions.name: 白塔山
attractions.description: 可俯瞰兰州城区和黄河。

attractions.name: 黄河母亲
attractions.description: 黄河岸边标志性雕塑。

attractions.name: 甘肃省博物馆
attractions.description: 馆藏文物35万件，有马踏飞燕。

attractions.name: 水车博览园
attractions.description: 展示兰州传统水车文化。

attractions.name: 西关清真大寺
attractions.description: 兰州最大的清真寺。

attractions.name: 五泉山公园
attractions.description: 因五眼清泉得名。

attractions.name: 兰州牛肉面
attractions.description: 兰州最著名的美食。

attractions.name: 兰州夜景
attractions.description: 黄河两岸的夜景。

attractions.name: 张掖路步行街
attractions.description: 兰州最繁华的商业街。

attractions.name: 白衣寺
attractions.description: 兰州古老的佛教寺院。

attractions.name: 黄河风情线
attractions.description: 沿黄河两岸的城市景观带。

restaurants.name: 兰州牛肉面
restaurants.address: Various Locations
restaurants.description: Legendary Lanzhou beef noodles - hand-pulled noodles in clear beef broth with white radish, the quintessential Lanzhou breakfast.

restaurants.name: 马子禄牛肉面
restaurants.address: Nanguan
restaurants.description: Legendary beef noodle shop with 100+ year history, serving the city's finest hand-pulled noodles.

restaurants.name: 黄河边烧烤
restaurants.address: South River Bank
restaurants.description: Riverside BBQ stalls with lamb skewers, cold beer, and Yellow River evening views.

restaurants.name: 手抓羊肉
restaurants.address: Various Locations
restaurants.description: Traditional boiled lamb served with hands, tender and flavorful Gansu plateau lamb.

restaurants.name: 酿皮
restaurants.address: Night Markets
restaurants.description: Famous Lanzhou cold noodle skin with spicy sauce, refreshing street snack popular with locals.

restaurants.name: 羊肉泡馍
restaurants.address: Muslim Quarter
restaurants.description: Crispy flatbread pieces in rich lamb broth, served with lamb and herbs, filling Muslim dish.

restaurants.name: 灰豆子
restaurants.address: Various Locations
restaurants.description: Sweet grey bean soup with red dates, traditional Lanzhou dessert drink, unique flavor.

restaurants.name: 热冬果
restaurants.address: Night Markets
restaurants.description: Hot pear and ginger drink, traditional winter remedy sold by street vendors in cold months.

restaurants.name: 杏皮水
restaurants.address: Street Vendors
restaurants.description: Sweet apricot drink made from dried apricot peels, refreshing local specialty, best on hot days.

restaurants.name: 羊肉串
restaurants.address: Night Markets
restaurants.description: Lamb skewers grilled over charcoal, addictive street food found at every night market.

restaurants.name: 拉扎面
restaurants.address: East Side
restaurants.description: Traditional wheat noodles in garlic vinegar sauce, unique Lanzhou breakfast with sour-spicy taste.

restaurants.name: 马大胡子
restaurants.address: Donggang
restaurants.description: Popular Muslim restaurant chain known for quality lamb dishes and authentic Islamic cuisine.

restaurants.name: 牛肉拉面
restaurants.address: Every Corner
restaurants.description: Every Lanzhou street has beef noodle shops - try different ones for comparison, each has unique broth flavor.

restaurants.name: 金城第一汤
restaurants.address: West Side
restaurants.description: Renowned beef noodle restaurant with secret family recipe, locals line up before dawn for the first bowls.

restaurants.name: 三泡台
restaurants.address: Teahouses
restaurants.description: Traditional Gansu tea with goji berries, longan, and rock sugar in a covered cup, social drink.

restaurants.name: 黄焖羊肉
restaurants.address: Muslim Quarter
restaurants.description: Lamb braised with potatoes and peppers in rich sauce, hearty Gansu specialty, sharing dish.

restaurants.name: 面片
restaurants.address: Various
restaurants.description: Hand-torn noodle pieces in vegetable or lamb soup, home-style Lanzhou comfort food.

restaurants.name: 马国礼
restaurants.address: Xigu
restaurants.description: Legendary Muslim restaurant with decades of history, known for exceptional lamb preparations.

restaurants.name: 鸡蛋糟
restaurants.address: Street Vendors
restaurants.description: Warm rice wine with egg, traditional winter drink in Lanzhou, sweet and warming.

restaurants.name: 凉皮
restaurants.address: Night Markets
restaurants.description: Cold rice noodles with spicy sauce, popular summer street snack throughout Lanzhou.

restaurants.name: 麻辣烫
restaurants.address: Various
restaurants.description: Spicy hot pot in麻辣烫 style with various ingredients, popular casual dining choice.

restaurants.name: 烤全羊
restaurants.address: Resort Areas
restaurants.description: Whole lamb roasted on spit, ceremonial dish for special occasions, requires advance order.

restaurants.name: 甜胚子
restaurants.address: Street Vendors
restaurants.description: Sweet fermented barley, refreshing summer drink, unique Lanzhou flavor found at street stalls.

restaurants.name: 大漠烤肉
restaurants.address: North Side
restaurants.description: Popular BBQ restaurant with desert-themed decor, serving quality lamb and beef skewers.

restaurants.name: 老兰州奶茶
restaurants.address: Nanguan
restaurants.description: Traditional Lanzhou milk tea with yak butter and salt, authentic Tibetan-influenced drink.

arrival.tips: Airport 70km from city. Airport bus (30¥) or high-speed train (25¥) to city. Good connections.

arrival.to: Lanzhou Railway Station / Lanzhou West Station
arrival.tips: Lanzhou West for high-speed trains. Regular trains at main station. Both have metro connections.

bike: Flat city terrain good for cycling
rental: Day trips to Qilian Mountains popular

hotels.name: 兰州万达文华酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best luxury in city. Book river view rooms. Good base for sightseeing.

hotels.name: 兰州皇冠假日酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best location near river. The breakfast is excellent. Book river view rooms.

hotels.name: 兰州饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Good mid-range option. Historic hotel with character. Book direct for discounts.

hotels.name: 黄河饭店
hotels.bookingTips: Good location near river attractions. Book river view rooms. Simple but adequate.

hotels.name: 兰州背包客青年旅舍
hotels.bookingTips: Best for backpackers. English speaking staff. Great for Silk Road travelers. Book ahead.

hotels.name: 白塔山宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Good for nature lovers. Near Baita Mountain hike. Book park view rooms.

hotels.name: 甘肃大剧院酒店
hotels.bookingTips: New property with modern amenities. Good for business travelers. Book direct.

hotels.name: 西关清真寺招待所
hotels.bookingTips: Stay in Muslim quarter for cultural experience. Simple accommodation. Great Muslim food nearby.

hotels.name: 兰州锦江之星
hotels.bookingTips: Reliable budget option. Multiple locations in city. Book online for discounts.

hotels.name: 兰州飞天大酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Good for business travelers. Modern amenities. Book weekend rates for value.

hotels.name: 青城古镇民宿
hotels.bookingTips: Stay overnight in ancient town for quiet experience. Local homestays available. Book through local guides.

hotels.name: 刘家峡宾馆
hotels.bookingTips: Base for Bingling Caves day trip. Good for photography tours. The canyon scenery is beautiful.

hotels.name: 兴隆山度假村
hotels.bookingTips: Good for hiking trips. Mountain air is refreshing. Book hiking packages. Summer escape from city.

hotels.name: 黄河三峡游艇酒店
hotels.nameEn: Yellow River Three Gorges Boat Hotel
hotels.bookingTips: Unique overnight on Yellow River. The canyon views are stunning. Book in advance for best cabins.

hotels.name: 兰州东站亚朵酒店
hotels.bookingTips: Best for train travelers. New hotel with consistent quality. Book direct for best rates.

culturalTips.title: Lanzhou Beef Noodles
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou beef noodles are a breakfast institution. Arrive before 10am for the freshest noodles. Each shop has unique broth recipe. Try comparing several shops.

culturalTips.title: Silk Road Heritage
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou was a key Silk Road trading post. Visit the Gansu Museum to understand the historical significance. The city's architecture reflects this multicultural history.

culturalTips.title: Islamic Culture
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou has a significant Muslim community. Respect Islamic customs at mosques. The Muslim quarter has excellent halal food options.

culturalTips.title: Night Market Culture
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou's night markets come alive after sunset. Try lamb skewers, niangpi, and local snacks. Minzhu Street and river banks have best night food.

culturalTips.title: Yellow River
culturalTips.content: The Yellow River flows through Lanzhou's center. Walk along the river banks, especially at sunset. The iron bridge is iconic landmark.

culturalTips.title: Gansu Cuisine
culturalTips.content: Gansu cuisine combines Muslim, Mandarin, and Tibetan influences. Must-try: beef noodles, hand-grabbed lamb, liangpi, and unique desserts like grey bean soup.

culturalTips.title: Early Rising
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou beef noodle shops close by early afternoon. Plan breakfast early. Many other restaurants also close between 2-5pm.

culturalTips.title: Mosque Etiquette
culturalTips.content: At mosques and Muslim areas, dress modestly and remove shoes before entering prayer halls. Photography inside prayer halls may not be allowed.

culturalTips.title: Tea Culture
culturalTips.content: Three Pao Tai (san pao tai) is the traditional Gansu tea - a mixture of green tea, goji berries, longan, and rock sugar in a covered cup.

culturalTips.title: Lanzhou Dialect
culturalTips.content: Lanzhou dialect is distinctive within Gansu. Locals are friendly and patient with visitors trying Mandarin. Basic phrases appreciated.

culturalTips.title: Lanzhou Souvenirs
culturalTips.content: Look for Hei Shan (black dates) from Gansu, minority handicrafts, and Gansu cave replicas. The night markets have good souvenir options.

culturalTips.title: Sandstorms
culturalTips.content: Spring sandstorms from Gobi can affect Lanzhou. Check weather before day trips. Summer thunderstorms can cause flash floods in mountain areas.

culturalTips.title: Muslim Quarter Language
culturalTips.content: In Muslim areas, many vendors speak Mandarin but some older residents may use local dialect. Hand signals and patience help communication.

culturalTips.title: Toasting Etiquette
culturalTips.content: When sharing meals with locals, especially lamb dishes, accept food offered as a sign of friendship. Leaving some food shows satisfaction.

culturalTips.title: Yellow River Boat Culture
culturalTips.content: Boat rides on the Yellow River offer unique views of the canyon scenery, especially at Liujiaxia where the water turns turquoise blue.
